message:
feat(fcp-store): add power and network-aware adaptive repair budgeting

Extend RepairPlanningOptions with mains_power, metered_network, and
bandwidth_estimate_kbps fields so the repair planner adapts its budget
to device conditions:

- effective_budget() doubles max_repairs, max_bytes, and max_decode_ms
  when on mains power with >= 50 Mbps unmetered bandwidth and a severe
  zone SLO deficit exists.
- On metered networks, non-critical repairs (hot-object pre-staging,
  non-severe policy deficits) are deferred with DeferredPowerBudget
  reason codes for explainability.

Adds two integration tests:
- repair_planner_adapts_to_power_and_network_conditions: validates
  baseline, aggressive (2x), and metered (defer non-critical) paths.
- planner_defers_hot_object_prestage_on_metered_network.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
